'''βàös-ch-g-n''' ('''kasachgenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rugby|rugby]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ch-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rugby|rugby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàös-ch-g-n
|-
! Lemma
| kasachgenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
